tracking_issue.title: Epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow
tracking_issue.body:
Replace the manual email/Excel leave approval process with a configurable, auditable digital workflow that enforces real-time balance checks and routes approvals through a multi-level circuit.

**Business value:** Eliminates inconsistent, untracked leave approvals, gives HR a defensible audit trail, and prevents balance/quota errors — while being configurable enough to roll out client-by-client starting with a pilot.

**In scope:**
- Leave request lifecycle: submit, approve, reject, cancel
- Real-time balance/quota validation
- Configurable multi-level approval circuit (manager, then HR above threshold)
- Delegation overlay for approvers
- Auto-escalation after 5 business days
- HR-validated cancellation, including already-started leave
- Role-based permissions (Employee, Manager, HR, Administrator)
- Email and in-app notifications on key events
- One-way sync to external calendar
- Per-client configuration of approval circuits and entitlement rules
- Audit trail of approval decisions and rule template changes
- Pilot rollout with multi-tenant configuration isolation

**Out of scope:**
- Payroll integration
- Two-way calendar synchronization
- Reporting dashboards / analytics beyond the audit trail
- Migration of historical email/Excel leave records
- Country rule templates beyond the initial French labor law template

### Issues

- [ ] Spike: define concurrency-safe balance checks and escalation timing
- [ ] Extend Leave/Absence data model
- [ ] Build balance/quota validation engine
- [ ] Build configurable multi-level approval circuit engine
- [ ] Implement auto-escalation after 5 business days
- [ ] Add delegation overlay on approval permissions
- [ ] Build HR-validated cancellation workflow
- [ ] Implement role-based permissions
- [ ] Integrate notifications on key workflow events
- [ ] Build one-way calendar sync integration
- [ ] Build per-client approval and entitlement configuration
- [ ] Build employee submission and status UI
- [ ] Build manager/HR approval and escalation queue UI
- [ ] Add audit trail for approvals and rule changes
- [ ] QA: acceptance and concurrency test suite
- [ ] Configure and validate pilot client rollout

issues.title: Spike: define concurrency-safe balance checks and escalation timing
issues.body:
Investigate and document how to handle overlapping requests re-validated at approval time, and how the escalation timer behaves if an approver/delegate acts concurrently. This decision shapes the data model and workflow engine.

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Extend Leave/Absence data model
issues.body:
Add approval status, approver chain, balance reference, delegation reference, escalation state and calendar reference fields to the existing Leave/Absence entity.

**Depends on:** Spike: define concurrency-safe balance checks and escalation timing

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build balance/quota validation engine
issues.body:
Implement real-time balance check on submission and re-validate at approval time to catch changes from overlapping requests, per the concurrency rules from the spike.

**Depends on:** Extend Leave/Absence data model

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build configurable multi-level approval circuit engine
issues.body:
Implement the submitted -> manager -> optional HR -> approved/rejected workflow, with the manager/HR threshold configurable per client, country and contract.

**Depends on:** Extend Leave/Absence data model

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Implement auto-escalation after 5 business days
issues.body:
Add a timer that escalates a pending request to the next approval level after 5 business days, race-safe against manual approval actions per the spike findings.

**Depends on:** Build configurable multi-level approval circuit engine

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Add delegation overlay on approval permissions
issues.body:
Allow an approver to delegate their approval authority; delegated actions must be attributed correctly and respected by the escalation timer.

**Depends on:** Build configurable multi-level approval circuit engine

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build HR-validated cancellation workflow
issues.body:
Implement cancellation of a leave request, including leave already started, requiring HR validation as a distinct workflow from the approval circuit.

**Depends on:** Build configurable multi-level approval circuit engine

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Implement role-based permissions
issues.body:
Enforce Employee/Manager/HR/Administrator access rules, with HR as the sole editor of already-approved requests; integrate with the delegation overlay.

**Depends on:** Extend Leave/Absence data model, Add delegation overlay on approval permissions

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Integrate notifications on key workflow events
issues.body:
Send email and in-app notifications on submission, approval, rejection, escalation and cancellation, routed to the correct role or delegate.

**Depends on:** Build configurable multi-level approval circuit engine, Implement auto-escalation after 5 business days, Build HR-validated cancellation workflow

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build one-way calendar sync integration
issues.body:
Push approved leave to the external calendar system; no changes are read back into the leave system.

**Depends on:** Build configurable multi-level approval circuit engine

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build per-client approval and entitlement configuration
issues.body:
Allow administrators to configure the approval circuit and entitlement rule templates per client, including the initial French labor law (paid leave, RTT) template, with tenant isolation for pilot-then-scale rollout.

**Depends on:** Build configurable multi-level approval circuit engine

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build employee submission and status UI
issues.body:
Let employees submit leave requests, see their balance in real time, and track request status through the circuit.

**Depends on:** Build balance/quota validation engine, Build configurable multi-level approval circuit engine

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Build manager/HR approval and escalation queue UI
issues.body:
Give managers and HR a queue to approve/reject requests, act on delegated items, and see escalated requests requiring attention.

**Depends on:** Build configurable multi-level approval circuit engine, Implement auto-escalation after 5 business days, Add delegation overlay on approval permissions, Build HR-validated cancellation workflow

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Add audit trail for approvals and rule changes
issues.body:
Log every state transition on a leave request and every change to entitlement rule templates, so HR can reconstruct who decided what and when.

**Depends on:** Extend Leave/Absence data model, Build configurable multi-level approval circuit engine, Build per-client approval and entitlement configuration

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: QA: acceptance and concurrency test suite
issues.body:
Formalize and run acceptance scenarios for approve/reject across the full circuit, including overlapping request revalidation, escalation-vs-manual-action races, and started-leave cancellation.

**Depends on:** Build balance/quota validation engine, Implement auto-escalation after 5 business days, Build HR-validated cancellation workflow, Integrate notifications on key workflow events

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_

issues.title: Configure and validate pilot client rollout
issues.body:
Set up the pilot client's approval circuit and entitlement templates in production configuration, and validate isolation from other tenants before wider rollout.

**Depends on:** Build per-client approval and entitlement configuration, Add audit trail for approvals and rule changes, QA: acceptance and concurrency test suite

_Part of epic: Digital Leave Approval Workflow_
